name: Baked Salmon with Herb Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 each Greens of onion, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the salmon fillet into 4 serving pieces.
2. Place one large side of a fillet toward the edge of a pyrex baking dish with the center open.
3. Pierce the fish and dot it with butter.
4. Cover with plastic wrap.
5. Microwave on Medium (50%) for 5 minutes.
6. Mix together mayonaise, parsley, onion, and dill.
7. Spread the mixture over the top of the fillets.
8. Cover again and microwave on Medium (50%), covered, for 5-6 more minutes before serving.
9. Garnish with lemon wedges. If using steaks, arrange them with thin ends toward the center of the dish. One-inch steaks should be microwaved for 5 minutes at medium power, then covered with the mixture and microwaved for an additional 5-6 minutes.
